title: NekoUI - Azusa Swimsuit Animated Backgrund
body:
## About
An extension for NekoUI, compatible with versions from 1.0-release to the latest.

Dependencies : [NekoUI](https://modrinth.com/project/EZpbRipP)

## Preview
### Screenshot :
![Scren](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b8185c62cde1b0ad802792185116fcf9e02701.jpeg)

### Video :
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k6JlzMx4dbo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## How To Use?
1. Download [NekoUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/nekoui) along with its [dependencies](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), then place them in the mods folder.

2. Download the extension you want and put it in the resourcepacks folder.

3. Go to NekoUI settings to start using it.
